subject: Feebas
description: A small, drab fish Pokemon floats at the surface of a calm pond, its head and tail breaking the waterline. Its body is mottled brown and tan with a pale underside, pinched cheeks, and a vacant wide-eyed expression. Concentric ripples spread around it across the bright blue water. A grassy bank curves along the far shore under a soft daytime sky dotted with cumulus clouds. The composition is centered, gentle, and uncrowded, with a flat children's-book illustration style.
foreground: Feebas at water surface with ripples
background: calm pond with distant grassy bank and cloudy sky
emotion: blank vacant stare, placid floating posture
